name: Autumn Plaid
description: A cosy tartan in warm autumn tones — our most-loved everyday scarf for walks in the park.

name: Sage Corduroy
description: Earthy and understated. The gentle ribbing adds texture without bulk — perfect for slimmer necks.

name: Blush Floral
description: Delicate ditsy florals on a soft blush ground. A spring favourite that photographs beautifully.

name: Midnight Spot
description: Classic polka dots in deep navy. Smart enough for special occasions. Currently sold out — message to pre-order.

name: Ochre Stripe
description: Sunny breton stripes in golden ochre. Light and breathable for warmer days.

name: Forest Tartan
description: A rich woodland check with a soft brushed finish. Made for crisp morning adventures.
